notes: Closed-form identity: total effect = natural direct + natural indirect effect (NDE + NIE), and proportion mediated = NIE / total (Pearl 2001; VanderWeele 2015).

records.reference: inverse-variance-weighted MR closed form (Burgess et al. 2013)
